Class ProceduralStyleGenerator

java.lang.Object
org.jscience.social.arts.ProceduralStyleGenerator
public final class ProceduralStyleGenerator extends Object
Procedural generation of artistic styles based on historical parameters.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    ProceduralStyleGenerator.Period
    Historical art periods with their characteristic parameters.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Map<String,Object>
    generateCompositionRules(ProceduralStyleGenerator.Period period)
    Generates composition parameters for a given period.
    static List<int[]>
    generatePalette(ProceduralStyleGenerator.Period period, int colorCount)
    Generates a period-appropriate color palette.
    static Real
    hierarchicalScale(Real baseSize, int importanceRank, int totalElements)
    Calculates the size of an element based on importance (Medieval/Byzantine style).
    static Real
    perspectiveScale(Real distance, Real focalLength, ProceduralStyleGenerator.Period period)
    Calculates perspective scaling factor for distance from viewer.

      Calculates the size of an element based on importance (Medieval/Byzantine style).
